endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/operations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /providers/{managementGroupsNamespace}/managementGroups/{managementGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyStates/{policyStatesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy states for the resources under the management group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYSTATESRESOURCE}} with a real policystatesresource. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPSNAMESPACE}} with a real managementgroupsnamespace. Replace {{MANAGEMENTGROUPNAME}} with a real managementgroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyStates/{policyStatesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy states for the resources under the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSTATESRESOURCE}} with a real policystatesresource.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyStates/{policyStatesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy states for the resources under the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{POLICYSTATESRESOURCE}} with a real policystatesresource. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyStates/{policyStatesResource}/queryResults
endpoints.description: Queries policy states for the resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{POLICYSTATESRESOURCE}} with a real policystatesresource. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.PolicyInsights/policyStates/$metadata
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
